control_motor_starter.description: Single-motor starter control circuit (DOL, star-delta, autotransformer, soft-start, VFD start logic). Requires sequence_of_operation describing start/stop/protection-trip sequence.

control_changeover.description: Generator / UPS / mains-mains changeover schemes. Requires sequence_of_operation describing source-priority logic + transfer-time constraints.

control_sequence.description: Multi-step control sequence (HVAC stage start, plant interlock, etc.). Requires sequence_of_operation describing state machine.

protection_overcurrent.description: IDMT or instantaneous overcurrent protection (ANSI 50/51). Requires protection_settings with ansi_code + set_value + time_curve + ct_ratio.

protection_differential.description: Transformer differential (87T) or busbar differential (87B). Requires protection_settings with bias slope + stabilising resistor + ct ratio matching.

protection_motor.description: Motor protection scheme (49 thermal + 50/51 overcurrent + 86 lockout + 37 undercurrent + 47 phase rotation). Requires protection_settings per ANSI code.

protection_busbar.description: Busbar protection (87B + 50BF breaker failure + zone overlap). Requires protection_settings with zone-mapping + 50BF time grading.
